query:
SELECT r.id, r.room_number, r.template_id, t.name as template_name, p.name as property_name
FROM peppr_rooms r
LEFT JOIN peppr_service_templates t ON r.template_id = t.id
LEFT JOIN peppr_properties p ON r.property_id = p.id
WHERE r.room_number = '103'
LIMIT 5;
